_comment: Curated viewer labels for S-101 viewing groups. Source: PC viewingGroup names/descriptions in src/EncDotNet.S100.Specifications/content/S101/pc/portrayal_catalogue.xml. The raw PC name and description remain available in each row's tooltip; this file only supplies a clean display label.

11050.label: No data, unsurveyed, and incompletely surveyed areas

12210.label: Bridges, pylons, overhead cables, conveyors, pipelines, and offshore platforms

12410.label: Coastline, glaciers, shoreline construction, dolphins, and floating structures

14010.label: Isolated underwater dangers in deep water

14050.label: Isolated above-water dangers in safe water

21020.label: Chart 1 features and virtual AIS aids to navigation

21030.label: Chart scale boundary and overscale data

22010.label: Lakes, sloping ground, dykes, causeways, dams, and dock areas

24010.label: Mooring and ferry cables, seabed tunnels, and sandwaves

24020.label: Isolated underwater dangers in unsafe water

24050.label: Isolated above-water dangers in unsafe water

25010.label: Traffic routeing — leading lines, lanes, separation, and roundabouts

25040.label: Radar lines and shore radar limits

26040.label: Submarine transit lanes, military practice, seaplane, and offshore production areas

27010.label: Buoys, light floats, and mooring buoys

27040.label: Direction of buoyage and IALA buoyage regions

27240.label: Physical and virtual AIS aids to navigation

28010.label: Pilot boarding points and pilotage districts

31010.label: Survey quality, sounding datum, and vertical datum

31080.label: Magnetic variation and local magnetic anomalies

32010.label: Dunes, hills, ridges, clifftops, contours, and elevations

32220.label: Landmarks, buildings, tanks, walls, and forts (non-conspicuous)

32250.label: Landmarks, buildings, tanks, walls, and forts (non-conspicuous, variant)

32270.label: Industrial production areas — quarries, refineries, power stations, wind farms

32410.label: Harbour facilities and customs check points

32440.label: Berth numbers, mooring facilities, gates, dry docks, and cranes

34051.label: Non-dangerous rocks, wrecks, and obstructions (with sounding value)

36020.label: Harbour areas, free ports, and customs zones

36050.label: Contiguous, EEZ, national territorial, and administrative areas

21.label: Text — buoy and beacon names or numbers

27.label: Text — magnetic variation and swept depth

53015.label: Alert highlight — areas to be avoided

53016.label: Alert highlight — particularly sensitive sea area

53019.label: Alert highlight — user-defined areas to be avoided

53024.label: Alert highlight — marine farm and aquaculture

90000.label: Shallow water pattern (less than safety contour)
